title: Dubai launches ‘work from park’ initiative to turn public spaces into flexible work hubs
summary_full: Dubai is transforming public parks into "Work from Park" spaces, offering nature-based work environments for professionals, freelancers, and small businesses. This initiative, supported by Group AMANA and Letswork, aims to enhance quality of life and boost economic activity. The first location opens in May 2026 at Al Barsha Pond Park, with more to follow.
